name: FONAR CORP
summary: FONAR Corporation designs, manufactures, sells, and services MRI scanners, including the Upright Multi-Position MRI scanner. Founded in 1978, FONAR built the first MRI scanner in 1977 and introduced the first commercial MRI in 1980. Through subsidiary HMCA, FONAR provides comprehensive non-medical management, administrative, billing, and diagnostic services to 44 MRI facilities across New York and Florida, generating $95.4 million in fiscal 2025 revenues from those facilities.

products.name: Upright Multi-Position MRI Scanner (Stand-Up MRI)
products.description: Open MRI scanner allowing patients to be scanned in upright and multiple positions, protected by FONAR patents.

products.name: FONAR 360 MRI Scanner
products.description: MRI scanner developed by FONAR; not presently being marketed.

products.name: HMCA Management Services
products.description: Comprehensive non-medical management services including billing, staffing, administrative, compliance, and marketing for diagnostic imaging facilities.
